{{Infobox technique
| name = Archlord soulfire
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Archlord]] [[soulfire]] represents the highest tier of [[soulfire]], characterized by its appearance as a smooth, blue-white flame that resembles quicksilver. It is an incredibly potent energy used to refine spirits, bodies, and various techniques. In the practice of [[Soulsmithing]], it is considered the ultimate form of [[soulfire]], used to temper even high-level remnants such as those belonging to [[Monarchs]] or [[Heralds]]. This energy is also utilized in the creation of advanced artifacts and can be used to bind constructs together within a [[Soulforge]]. Beyond its utility in smithing, [[Archlord]] [[soulfire]] can be used to influence the [[aura]] of a person's mind or to support the process of physical and spiritual transformation.}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Archlord soulfire]] rippled through [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Archlord soulfire]] is the highest level of [[soulfire]] and looks like quicksilver.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Archlord soulfire]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Archlord soulfire]] can refine [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Archlord soulfire]] supported the process of the spirit flowing into [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
